'''ramulu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mycofumigant|mycofumigant]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-m-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mycofumigant|mycofumigant]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| ramulu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræmilith|ræmilith]] || [[word:ræmilij|ræmilij]] || [[word:ræmilish|ræmilish]] || [[word:ræmili|ræmili]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ramumuluth|ramumuluth]] || [[word:ramumuluj|ramumuluj]] || [[word:ramumulush|ramumulush]] || [[word:ramumulu|ramumulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ramuluth|ramuluth]] || [[word:ramuluj|ramuluj]] || [[word:ramulush|ramulush]] || [[word:ramulu|ramulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ramufluth|ramufluth]] || [[word:ramufluj|ramufluj]] || [[word:ramuflush|ramuflush]] || [[word:ramufluf|ramufluf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ramuluthu|ramuluthu]] || [[word:ramuluju|ramuluju]] || [[word:ramulushu|ramulushu]] || [[word:ramuluku|ramuluku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ramuluth|ramuluth]] || [[word:ramuluj|ramuluj]] || [[word:ramulush|ramulush]] || [[word:ramulu|ramulu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ramuluthul|ramuluthul]] || [[word:ramulujul|ramulujul]] || [[word:ramulushul|ramulushul]] || [[word:ramulukul|ramulukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ramuluthuthu|ramuluthuthu]] || [[word:ramulujuju|ramulujuju]] || [[word:ramulushushu|ramulushushu]] || [[word:ramuluku|ramuluku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ramuluthun|ramuluthun]] || [[word:ramulujun|ramulujun]] || [[word:ramulushun|ramulushun]] || [[word:ramulukun|ramulukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ramuluthuoro|ramuluthuoro]] || [[word:ramulujuoro|ramulujuoro]] || [[word:ramulushuoro|ramulushuoro]] || [[word:ramulukuoro|ramulukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
